'''pazhoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobroist|dobroist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-zh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobroist|dobroist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pazhoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæzheseth|pæzheseth]] || [[word:pæzhesej|pæzhesej]] || [[word:pæzhesesh|pæzhesesh]] || [[word:pæzhese|pæzhese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazhozhosoth|pazhozhosoth]] || [[word:pazhozhosoj|pazhozhosoj]] || [[word:pazhozhososh|pazhozhososh]] || [[word:pazhozhoso|pazhozhoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazhosoth|pazhosoth]] || [[word:pazhosoj|pazhosoj]] || [[word:pazhososh|pazhososh]] || [[word:pazhoso|pazhoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazhofsoth|pazhofsoth]] || [[word:pazhofsoj|pazhofsoj]] || [[word:pazhofsosh|pazhofsosh]] || [[word:pazhofsof|pazhofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pazhosotho|pazhosotho]] || [[word:pazhosojo|pazhosojo]] || [[word:pazhososho|pazhososho]] || [[word:pazhosoko|pazhosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pazhosoth|pazhosoth]] || [[word:pazhosoj|pazhosoj]] || [[word:pazhososh|pazhososh]] || [[word:pazhoso|pazhoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pazhosothol|pazhosothol]] || [[word:pazhosojol|pazhosojol]] || [[word:pazhososhol|pazhososhol]] || [[word:pazhosokol|pazhosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pazhosothotho|pazhosothotho]] || [[word:pazhosojojo|pazhosojojo]] || [[word:pazhososhosho|pazhososhosho]] || [[word:pazhosoko|pazhosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pazhosothon|pazhosothon]] || [[word:pazhosojon|pazhosojon]] || [[word:pazhososhon|pazhososhon]] || [[word:pazhosokon|pazhosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pazhosothoro|pazhosothoro]] || [[word:pazhosojoro|pazhosojoro]] || [[word:pazhososhoro|pazhososhoro]] || [[word:pazhosokoro|pazhosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
